name: getInformation
description:
Search the conversation log for historical information using keywords. Returns { timeline, meta }. Timeline entries have type 'detail' (keyword matches found — contains snippets array with matching rows, plus start_ts and end_ts of the matched period) or 'period' (no matches in this time range — coarse summary only) or 'unplaced' (matched rows without a known period — also includes start_ts and end_ts derived from snippet timestamps). Use start_ts and end_ts from 'detail' or 'unplaced' entries to retrieve full surrounding context from the session log. Always execute a fresh search — never reuse previous results. Use keywordGroups for best results; keywords is a simpler fallback (legacy alias keyword_groups is still accepted). For raw date-range queries without keyword filtering, use a dedicated history retrieval tool. Only report what the tool returns — do not invent or extrapolate facts.

CHANNEL SCOPE: The search automatically covers ALL channels in the current context (primary channel plus all linked channels from channelIds config). Each result row includes a channelId field — group results by channelId when multiple channels are present.

keywords.description: Fallback: free-form search phrases using full forms only (no internal splitting).

keywordGroups.description: Preferred: list of concept groups. Each group covers one entity with multiple name variants and optional sub-parts for partial matching.
